3181310.name: Storm Cleaner Demo
3181310.description:
Storm Cleaner Demo

You are a Storm Cleaner. After a storm left an island, you will visit them and organize everythings to their original position.

Demo Content

All contents are available same as full release. Except you can play up to the first 2 levels in this demo.


Explore Hidden Object

Exploring every corner of the island to find what in it. To help a Storm Cleaner in their job, you need to discover hollow stars around the island. Hollow stars are magical embed devices which records the original position of items in the island.

Cozy Adventure

Relax yourself in this little adventure to different locations. Meet new friends at new islands. Have a talk or do a quest.

Feature

  • Action Hidden Object
  • NPC side story along your journey.
  • Multiple level which increase in difficulty.

英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 瑞典语, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
